intro.speaker: Aviator
intro.text: The border's gone quiet... too quiet. Something is stirring past the treeline.
Turn back, little bird. The sky belongs to the Swarm tonight.

intro.speaker: Aviator
intro.text: Funny, I was about to say the same thing to you.

outro.speaker: Aviator
outro.text: Scouts, nothing more. Whoever sent them is still out there.
